message:
feat: Integrate MPSGraph matmul into Metal inference engine

Adds MPSMatmulEngine to MetalInferenceEngine for automatic Neural
Engine routing. MPSGraph will automatically decide whether to use
GPU or NPU based on operation characteristics.

Changes:
- Added mps_matmul import to metal_inference.zig
- Initialize MPSMatmulEngine in Metal engine init
- Cleanup MPSGraph engine in deinit
- Fixed calling convention (.c not .C for Zig 0.15)

Next: Wire MPSGraph matmul into actual layer computation
